title: Expression and purification Twin-STREP-FLAG tagged ATG13:ATG101 constructs
steps: Transfect HEK GNTI cells at concentration of 2 × 10 6 cells/ml

Resuspended pellet in lysis buffer (25 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 200 mM NaCl, 2 mM MgCl 2 , 1 mM TCEP, 5 mM EDTA, 10% Glycerol) with 1% Triton X-100 and protease inhibitor cocktail (Thermo Scientific, Waltham, MA) for 15 min

Rock supernatant with equilibrated resin for 01:00:00 at 4 °C Use glutathione resin for GST tagged proteins Use amylose resin for MBP tagged proteins Use Strep-Tactin Sepharose resin for Strep tagged proteins
Wash strep-tactin resin (IBA Lifesciences, Germany) into lysis buffer (without Triton). Load clarified lysate onto resin
Wash with 5CV lysis buffer (25 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 200 mM NaCl, 2 mM MgCl 2 , 1 mM TCEP, 5 mM EDTA, 10% Glycerol)
Concentrate elution and inject onto pre-equilibrated S200 10/30 column (25 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 200 mM NaCl, 2 mM MgCl 2 , 1 mM TCEP, 5 mM EDTA)
Elute with lysis buffer plus 4 mM desthiobiotin for STREP resin
Pool peak fractions, concentrate, snap freeze, and store at -80C
In a separate tube, dilute DNA with Hybridoma-SFM(1X)
Add PEI to DNA dilution. Incubate mixture for 00:30:00 at 37 °C
Add mixture to cells. Let cells grow for 48:00:00
Wash pellet with cold PBS. Store pellet at -80C until purification.
creator: Adam Yokom
